ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE STRIAL
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY MILLER, NANCY KING, KENNETH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, NANCY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KING, KENNETH PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH ILLEGAL OR NEGLIGENT BLOCKING OF NEIGHBOR'S DRIVEWAY ACCESS BY DEFENDANT. THE COURT OFFERS NO OPINION AS TO WHETHER THE OWNER OF THE URBO PROPERTY IS MANAGING TENANT PARKING IN THE DRIVEWAY CORRECTLY OR SAFELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
